Start Earning

I want to know...

How does TopCashback make money?

We're supported by sponsored ads and promotions across the site, and sometimes retailers pay us a bonus for sending shoppers their way.

Will it cost me anything?

TopCashback is completely free to use. We don’t charge sign-up or membership fees at any time. Ever!

How does Cash Back work?

When you make a purchase from a retailer on TopCashback after clicking through from our site, the retailer pays us a commission for referring you. We pass 100% of this commission back to you as Cash Back. Once your purchase is confirmed, your Cash Back becomes "payable," meaning you can withdraw it and spend it.

When will I actually get my Cash Back?

Cash Back should track to your Earnings page within 7 days of your purchase, but it won't be ready to withdraw right away. We need to wait until the retailer's return period has passed, or until you've completed your trip (for travel purchases), before your Cash Back can be confirmed. Once the commission for your purchase is paid to us, we'll make your Cash Back "payable" and ready to withdraw.

What can I get Cash Back on?

You’ll find great Cash Back rates on everything from airport parking, hotel bookings and car rentals to your favorite fashion, electronics and home brands. Browse over 7,000 retailers to start saving money.

What cash out methods are available?

Withdrawing your Cash Back is easy. You can choose from several options, including bank transfer, PayPal, Venmo or gift cards—some of which come with bonuses of up to 5%. Popular cash out methods include a Virtual Visa Prepaid Card and gift cards from Amazon, Walmart, Target, Disney and dozens of other brands.

We've made it easy for you to find brands that support ethical and sustainable choices. From sustainable production and ethical sourcing, to protecting the world that supports us.
